title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, shares his bootstrapping playbook for reaching $10M ARR without external funding. The episode covers strategies for hitting $1M ARR in 117 days, product-led growth, SEO optimization, outbound sales, pricing experimentation, and decision-making frameworks for bootstrapped founders.
